last_update_summary: Synced with test case commit 03899228. Deleted 5 test cases (kimi_k2_6 2x24p, minimax_m2_5 3x), renamed 3 (glm5_1, minimax_m2_5 aime25→gpqa), modified 14. Added <a> anchor tags (pd-disaggregation/single-node-pd-mixed/multi-node-pd-mixed). Fixed is_multi_node to use actual --nnodes value. Fixed quantization to BF16 when no --quantization arg. Auto-completed PD disaggregation params.
